Neil O'Brien
Member of Parliament for Harborough, Oadby & Wigston

Campaigns

HAVE YOUR SAY: Proposed mosque at the Old Crown Pub, Moat Street, Wigston

A proposal is being put together by a group of people to turn The Old Crown in Wigston into a mosque. I want to know what YOU think. I'm doing a consultation...

PETITION: STOP asylum accommodation in Kibworth and Great Glen

SERCO are planning to establish asylum seeker accommodation in the villages of Kibworth and Great Glen. They are the Government’s appointed contractors and are...

Join our campaign to protect plans for two new hospitals in Leicester

Plans for two new hospitals, a midwifery-led unit and a multi-storey car park are incredibly important to people across Harborough, Oadby and Wigston who depend...

Making it easier to see your GP

Fighting for better health provision locally is a big priority for me. When I was a health minister, I made some big changes to make it easier to see your GP...

Fighting crime

One of the things that brought me into politics is a belief in the importance of law and order. I'm pleased that the Government are now recruiting an extra 20...

Stopping illegal immigration

Illegal immigration is unfair, dangerous and fuels criminality. I will do whatever it takes to stop the small boats coming across the channel. France is a...

Improving planning and protecting green spaces

I care passionately about preserving our beautiful landscapes, villages and towns. Therefore, fixing our broken planning system and fighting cowboy developers...

Fixing potholes, improving transport

Fixing potholes is a high priority, for drivers and cyclists. Last year Leicestershire County Council resurfaced the equivalent of over 65 miles of roads, this...

Dealing with the cost of living

Despite the massive challenges of recent years, Britain's economy has grown faster than Germany, France, Spain, Portugal, Italy and many other countries since...

Neil O'Brien Conservative MP for Harborough, Oadby & Wigston
